assessment_objectives.objective: system development life cycle is defined.
the system is acquired, developed and managed using organization-defined system-development life cycle that incorporates information cybersecurity / data privacy considerations.
cybersecurity / data privacy roles and responsibilities are defined and documented throughout the system development life cycle.
individuals with cybersecurity / data privacy roles and responsibilities are identified.
organizational cybersecurity / data privacy risk management processes are integrated into system development life cycle activities.
system pre-production environments are protected commensurate with risk throughout the system development life cycle for the system, system component or system service.
systems or system components that implement the security design principle of procedural rigor are defined.
systems or system components implement the security design principle of procedural rigor.
